name: anthropic.messages.create
description: Anthropic citations: when the model cites a source, it emits a {type:'text', citations:[...]} block. Each citation has {type, cited_text, document_index, document_title, start_char_index, end_char_index} (char-based) OR start_page_number/end_page_number (page-based). Renderer must surface the cited_text as a footnote-style chip under the text block, not lose them.

source.data: Maple Ridge community handbook. Quiet hours are 10pm to 7am. Trash pickup is Tuesday and Friday. The pool is open May through September.

content.text: Trash pickup at Maple Ridge is on

citations.cited_text: Trash pickup is Tuesday and Friday.
